message:
fix(robot,scheduler,tui): extract controlPaneIndex, fix backoff extension race, align resize tests to 6-panel

Three targeted fixes:

1. Monitor pane index extraction (robot/monitor.go, monitor_test.go):
   - Extract controlPaneIndex() and defaultMonitorPaneIndices() from
     inline logic in getAgentPanes() and PrintMonitor()
   - controlPaneIndex returns (int, bool) for clean empty-session handling
   - defaultMonitorPaneIndices replaces the old p.Index > 0 filter which
     broke when tmux pane-base-index was not 0
   - Tests: base-index-zero, base-index-one, nonstandard minimum,
     single-pane session, empty session

2. Backoff controller extension race (scheduler/backoff.go):
   - endGlobalBackoff() now checks if globalBackoffUntil was extended
     while the sleep goroutine was running
   - If backoff was extended, reschedules another sleep instead of
     prematurely clearing the backoff state

3. Resize test alignment (dashboard/dashboard_resize_test.go):
   - Update TestWindowSizeMsg_UpdatesDimensionsAndPanels to use
     MegaProportions6() (6-column) instead of MegaProportions()
   - Attention panel gets p5 sizing, sidebar panels (metrics, history,
     files, cass, spawn) get p6 sizing

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
